_comment: CyberSuisse design tokens — Phase 1 source of truth. Consumed as documentation; tailwind.config.js shallow-merges this object so we keep tailwind-reserved keys out and group everything under `tokens`.

notes.redUsage: --color-accent-red is permitted ONLY on PentestPage.tsx and OSINTPage.tsx as an offensive accent.
notes.buttons: Flat only — no 3D, no glassmorphism, no heavy shadows.
